message:
plugins: bump rulake-stack to 2.3.0-alpha.2 to invalidate stale cache

Diagnosed an install-cache issue: Claude Code keys plugin caches by
plugin.json.version, and rulake-stack stayed at 2.3.0-alpha.1 across
multiple commits that added content to plugins/rulake-stack/commands/
(rvdna-find.md, ruqu-simulate.md, plus the original rulake-* trio).

Cache state was:
  ~/.claude/plugins/cache/rulake-marketplace/rulake-stack/2.3.0-alpha.1/
    .claude-plugin/plugin.json
    .mcp.json
    README.md
    (no commands/ — never re-extracted because version unchanged)

Symptom: /rulake-stack:* slash commands returned "No commands match"
even though /reload-plugins reported rulake-stack as installed and
its 18 MCP tools resolved correctly.

Fix: bump version to 2.3.0-alpha.2. Description note appended so
the changelog is in-band.

Operator action required:
  /plugin update rulake-stack@rulake-marketplace
  /reload-plugins

After update, /rulake-stack:rvdna-find and /rulake-stack:ruqu-simulate
should resolve alongside the existing rulake-{query,verify,bundle-info}.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 {
   "name": "rulake-stack",
-  "description": "Killer-path install for ruLake. Bundles rulake-core + rulake-substrates + rulake-witness with sensible defaults so a fresh Claude Code session has working witness-anchored retrieval in under 60 seconds.",
-  "version": "2.3.0-alpha.1",
+  "description": "Killer-path install for ruLake. Bundles rulake-core + rulake-substrates + rulake-witness with sensible defaults so a fresh Claude Code session has working witness-anchored retrieval in under 60 seconds. v2.3.0-alpha.2 adds the bundled rvdna-find + ruqu-simulate slash commands.",
+  "version": "2.3.0-alpha.2",
   "author": {
     "name": "rUv",
